typography.font_install_commands: Install from Google Fonts in index.css using @import

visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal. Use a subtle glow for Heritage Gold accents: drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(216,202,130,0.5)]. No soft generic gray shadows.
visual_enhancers.borders: Sharp 1px borders. Use border-white/10 for structural grids and border-[#D8CA82]/50 for interactive/focus states.
visual_enhancers.textures: Use the local brand asset /brand/pattern.png overlaid with low opacity (10-20%) and blend-mode: soft-light over #111111 background.
visual_enhancers.surfaces: Solid Midnight Black backgrounds. For sticky headers, use heavy glassmorphism: bg-[#111111]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10.

grids.marketing: Asymmetrical layout, big typography, generous spacing (p-12, p-24). Bento grid with gap-8 for feature highlights.
grids.dashboard: High-density functional grid for the player space. Sidebar with gap-4, tight paddings (p-4, p-6).

layouts.marketing_pages: Hero section dominated by large typography, deep black background, subtle gold pattern. No centered standard layouts.
layouts.app_dashboard: Left vertical navigation bar, dense top header with global actions, main content area maximizing screen real estate (h-screen).
layouts.infinite_canvas: Full width/height area with grid background dot pattern, custom panning wrapper.

component_strategy.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none). Solid #D8CA82 background for primary CTAs with #111111 text. Hover: slight lift and gold glow.
component_strategy.cards: Flat, sharp edges, dark surfaces (#1A1A1A) with 1px subtle borders. Use local accent-brackets-gold.png for decorative card corners.
component_strategy.inputs: Shadcn forms with flat styling, border-white/20 default, focus:border-[#D8CA82].
component_strategy.badges: Uppercase, tracking-widest, tiny text, sharp borders.

motion.transitions: Fast, precise, no bouncing. e.g., transition-transform duration-200 ease-out.
motion.hover_states: Text colors shift to Gold. Borders brighten. Subtle translation.
motion.page_load: Fade and slight upward slide for list elements.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure #f7f7f7 is used for primary text. #a0a0a0 for secondary. Avoid dark grey text on #111111. All interactive items MUST have focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D8CA82]).

media.images_treatment: High contrast, low saturation on photos. Do not apply gold blanket overlays; use gradients if text contrast is needed.

image_urls.description: Intense esports tournament with focused players
Black and white active esports studio

brand_assets.usage: Decorative element between sections or under headings
Framing for important images or quotes
Background texture, opacity 10%, soft-light blend mode

3d_libraries.recommendation: Use framer-motion for smooth 2D/2.5D transitions. 3D is not mandatory unless requested for an interactive logo, but sticking to crisp 2D geometry fits the 'Earned not given' strict vibe better.

instructions_to_main_agent: Set the overall theme strictly to DARK mode using #111111 base.
Implement internationalization (FR/EN) with FR as default. Include a language toggle.
Build marketing pages (Accueil, Matchs, Support, Recrutement) using raw HTML/Tailwind for custom layouts, avoiding Shadcn generic look. Use Shadcn ONLY for forms/complex logic.
Build the Protected Dashboard (Espace Joueur) using dense, card-less UI elements and strict layouts.
Implement Firebase/Google Auth for the Login/Register flow.
In the Player Space, implement 'Notes' (with drafts), 'Planning', and a 'Notion-like canvas' using an absolute positioned coordinate system or generic interactive canvas wrapper.
Include local brand assets correctly. Do not alter their colors or aspect ratios.
The match results page must show 'aucune donnée' (empty state) if no EVA results are present. Display opponent name and logo when data exists.
Include a chat UI for Support/Recruitment (live chat simulation) and Player Space (per game/global).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic AI slop. Create deep, striking visual hierarchies.
Use glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#111111]/80) rather than flat semi-transparent dark backgrounds for overlays.
Avoid the transition: all property completely. Target transitions explicitly (e.g., transition-colors, transition-transform).
Never center-align the .App container. Rely on structured grids.
Use pill-shaped or strictly rectangular buttons (0px radius) to reflect the aggressive/elite tone.
Prioritize pre-existing Shadcn components from /src/components/ui/ for dashboard functionality.
All interactive elements and key text MUST include a data-testid attribute (kebab-case, role-based).
Never use placeholder image services. Use the provided Unsplash/Pexels URLs or local brand assets.
Never use standard AI assistant emojis in the UI. Use proper icon libraries like Phosphor or Lucide.
